title: carex pisiformis var. alterniflora
intro: Carex pisiformis var. alterniflora is a plant species that belongs to the sedge family, known for its distinctive, rounded fruits and grass-like foliage. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex pisiformis var. alterniflora include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
